name: LLM Jailbreak
description: Adversaries use carefully crafted prompts to bypass LLM safety controls and guardrails, forcing unsafe responses.

name: LLM Prompt Injection
description: Adversaries craft malicious prompts that override instructions and cause unintended behavior.

name: RAG Poisoning
description: Adversaries inject malicious content into documents used by RAG systems.

name: False RAG Entry Injection
description: Adversaries introduce false documents into a RAG database to manipulate responses.
